data.name: username_required
data.value: Username is required.

data.name: pwd_required
data.value: Password is required.

data.name: pwd_length
data.value: Password must be at least 8 characters long.

data.name: error_not_found
data.value: Resource not found.

data.name: error_not_found_named
data.value: Could not read {0} information.

data.name: error_data_not_found
data.value: Data not found

data.name: error_decoding
data.value: Decoding error

data.name: error_invalid_parameters
data.value: Invalid or missing parameters

data.name: error_unauthorized
data.value: Unauthorized

data.name: error_invalid_credentials
data.value: Invalid credentials.

data.name: error_forbidden
data.value: You do not have permission to perform this operation.

data.name: error_gone
data.value: The requested resource is no longer available and has been permanently removed.

data.name: error_gone_named
data.value: {0} is no longer available and has been permanently removed.

data.name: error_unprocessable_entity
data.value: The request is syntactically valid but cannot be processed due to a semantic error.

data.name: error_too_many_requests
data.value: Too many requests. Please wait a moment and try again.

data.name: error_too_many_requests_timed
data.value: Too many requests. Please try again in {0} seconds.

data.name: error_conflict
data.value: Resource conflict. The requested operation cannot be completed.

data.name: error_conflict_named
data.value: {0} already exists or is in conflict with an existing resource.

data.name: error_not_implemented
data.value: The requested functionality is not yet supported by this server.

data.name: error_bad_gateway
data.value: The server received an invalid response from an upstream service.

data.name: error_service_unavailable
data.value: The service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.

data.name: error_service_unavailable_timed
data.value: The service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again in {0} seconds.

data.name: error_gateway_timeout
data.value: The upstream service did not respond in time. Please try again later.

data.name: play_id_length
data.value: The identifier is too long

data.name: play_stats_too_many
data.value: Too many game stats entries

data.name: error_mail_disabled
data.value: Email sending is not configured.

data.name: error_mail_send_failed
data.value: The message could not be sent. Please try again later.

data.name: error_mail_invalid_address
data.value: One or more email addresses are not valid.

data.name: error_mail_attachment_too_large
data.value: The attachments exceed the maximum allowed size.
